entries.message:
Event Type: Network Line Card Replacement

We are performing system changes in the Los Angeles location during the following scheduled maintenance window. 

Start Time: 2026-07-01 07:00:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-07-01 13:00:00 UTC

We schedule higher impact maintenance events during off-peak times to maintain our ideal hosting environment. Our engineers make every effort to minimize system impact; however, Los Angeles instances may be unreachable for some of the scheduled maintenance window as we perform a network card replacement.

Event Type: Storage Software Upgrade
Start Time: 2026-06-29 19:00:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-29 21:00:00 UTC

Our Cloud Storage team will be performing maintenance to storage located in Amsterdam. During this maintenance window, creating and deletion of object storage (performance and accelerated) and storage gateways may be unavailable. Storage gateways subscriptions may notice brief service interruptions as they are shifted to new hosts.

The storage team will monitor cluster health, node status, and workload recovery throughout the maintenance window.

Event Type: Storage Software Upgrade
Start Time: 2026-06-29 14:00:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-29 16:00:00 UTC

Our Cloud Storage team will be performing maintenance to storage located in Milan. During this maintenance window, creating, attaching, resizing, and deletion of storage and storage gateways may be unavailable. Storage gateways subscriptions may notice brief service interruptions as they are shifted to new hosts.

The storage team will monitor cluster health, node status, and workload recovery throughout the maintenance window.

Event Type: Storage Software Upgrade
Start Time: 2026-06-29 14:00:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-29 16:00:00 UTC

Our Cloud Storage team will be performing maintenance to storage located in Milan. During this maintenance window, creating, attaching, resizing, and deletion of storage and storage gateways may be unavailable. Storage gateways subscriptions may notice brief service interruptions as they are shifted to new hosts.

The storage team will monitor cluster health, node status, and workload recovery throughout the maintenance window.

Event Type: Network Upgrade

We are performing system changes in the São Paulo location during the following scheduled maintenance window. 

Start Time: 2026-06-30 03:00:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-30 08:00:00 UTC

We schedule higher impact maintenance events during off-peak times to maintain our ideal hosting environment. Our engineers make every effort to minimize system impact; however, São Paulo instances may be unreachable for some, or all, of the scheduled maintenance window as we perform network, firmware, or host upgrades.

Event Type: Object Storage Infrastructure Maintenance
Start Time: 2026-06-25 18:00:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-25 20:00:00 UTC

Our Cloud Storage team will be performing upgrades to our London Object Storage infrastructure starting at 2026-06-25 18:00:00 UTC. During this maintenance window, creating, attaching, resizing, and deletion of Object Storage subscriptions may be temporarily unavailable.

Previously deployed Object Storage subscriptions in London will remain online without interruption and will not be impacted by this event.

Event Type: Network Upgrade

We are performing system changes in the Toronto location during the following scheduled maintenance window. 

Start Time: 2026-06-25 04:05:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-25 08:05:00 UTC

We schedule higher impact maintenance events during off-peak times to reduce impact to customer infrastructure. Our engineers make every effort to minimize system impact, however, network reachability to Toronto instances may be affected for some, or all, of the scheduled maintenance window as we perform this work. While it’s important to be aware of start and end times of the maintenance window, due to our redundant network architecture, our engineers expect that you may see little to no impact at all while the work is performed.

Event Type: Network Upgrade

We are performing system changes in the Tokyo location during the following scheduled maintenance window. 

Start Time: 2026-06-29 15:05:00 UTC
End Time: 2026-06-29 19:05:00 UTC

We schedule higher impact maintenance events during off-peak times to reduce impact to customer infrastructure. Our engineers make every effort to minimize system impact, however, network reachability to Tokyo instances may be affected for some, or all, of the scheduled maintenance window as we perform this work. While it’s important to be aware of start and end times of the maintenance window, due to our redundant network architecture, our engineers expect that you may see little to no impact at all while the work is performed.
